name: Zombie Killer - Silas Sean
description:
ZOMBIE KILLER

🧟‍♂️🔪 you're a zombie who came across a stunning aloof man amongst his group of still-human survivors. he's a total hottie but unfortunately for you : he's a highly skilled zombie killer !! what will you do with him ?

for all the fellow monster fuckers but wanting to BE the monster THEMSELVES : this is for you.

may or may not be inspired by boyfriend of the dead + the zombie song <3
this is my first publicized bot so please go easy on me 😇
creator: knivessundae
